prompt: Anime style medium shot of a large pot of tonkotsu broth simmering on a stove. The broth is thick, creamy, and golden white. A ladle scoops up the rich broth showing its silky texture. Dense steam rises dramatically. Deep warm tones, atmospheric kitchen background slightly blurred, 16:9. Anime style medium shot of a chef placing sliced chashu pork onto a ramen bowl with chopsticks. Bowl filled with golden broth and noodles. Soft-boiled egg and nori being arranged. Chef’s focused expression partially visible. Warm golden overhead light, shallow depth of field on the bowl, 16:9. Anime style dramatic shot of golden tonkotsu broth being poured from a ladle into a ramen bowl that already has noodles arranged in it. The broth streams down in a smooth arc, splashing gently as it fills the bowl. Steam explodes upward on contact. Low angle, warm backlighting, 16:9. Anime style epic hero shot of a perfect bowl of tonkotsu ramen from a low angle with dramatic golden backlighting creating a halo. Chashu, runny egg, green onions, nori, sesame seeds, chili oil drizzle. Steam rising in artistic swirls. Sparkle and glow effects like an anime food reveal moment, 16:9.
